CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Off Calendar

Joinder In Plaintiffs Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Weber Stephen Products, Llc
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WEBER-STEPHEN PRODUCTS, LLC's Joinder In Plaintiffs Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Weber Stephen Products, Llc.

Off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion sought to be joined.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Weber Stephen Products, Llc
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Weber Stephen Products, Llc.

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Weber Stephen Products, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Consent Judgment signed. (see scanned order and consent judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Continued To Mar-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Rosle Usa Corp.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Rosle Usa Corp.

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Rosle USA Corp. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
